problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: The key to Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? is Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization — specifically Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
